name: straitjacket
description: Single-plugin marketplace for the straitjacket multi-agent test-engineering plugin.

plugins.name: straitjacket
plugins.description: Multi-agent test-engineering plugin built as composable chunks - specialist agents, workflow stages, and a Rust CLI that thin skills compose. Live skills: `tdd` (new features test-first: spec → red → adversarial-on-red → green → mutation, under a savepoint discipline) and `report-bug` (capture defects to a tracked ledger with opt-in mirror to GitHub/Jira, and bulk-publish findings to a tracker with consistent GitHub/Jira templates + parent/child grouping); the same engine composes into further skills (audit, fuzz, mutation, debug, triage). Fan-out phases run as dynamic-Workflow stages when available (else direct Agent dispatch). Supports Rust and C#.
